entry.content:
Then i think a lot.

Tell me what the sun.

Tell me what the moon.

let go.

WHEN that day.

WHEN that fork.

WHEN that end.

666
entry.summary:
Then i think a lot.

Tell me what the sun.

Tell me what the moon.
entry.title: WHEN

entry.content:
如果有机会的话——你要不要去月球呢？
I will make this anyway.
joke hha
entry.summary:
如果有机会的话——你要不要去月球呢？
I will make this anyway.
joke hha
entry.title: Unknow

entry.content:
Hey,
When you read these words, I am already gone.
Think not of who I was. Forget me now—
My friend, my family, my love, my all.
This world has been shattered in the darkness before the dawn,
And yet… we have not forgotten the warmth of the light.

I wonder, why is humanity so fragile?
You, you weep for the future.
He, he prays for an end to the pain.
I, I make a sacrifice in the name of hope.
And the world, it just blankets us all.

I try to remember… I reach out my hand, but find only velvet darkness before me.
It should be the memories, the bliss, waltzing to a forgotten melody, that fill our hearts,
Not this present pain, this memory that will not fade.

You have lost so much.
And I, I have lost so much, too.
In this, are we not the same?

Do you still remember?

My light.
My world.

That future, how ethereal and frail it has become.
Like a wilting flower, it vanishes, never to return. I am an offering, destined to give my soul unto God, to leave this world of suffering behind.
This, I suppose, is my future, and my end.

No pity, no sorrow, no tears. Please, my dear child, wipe your tears away.
The walking corpses at your side cannot make you despair; they cannot seize your mind, nor can they take your flame.
Heal. Please, heal, won’t you?

I am here.
I will always be here.
I will never leave you.
I will never leave any of you.
I will never leave this world.
I will never leave any of Hell’s own children.

So love you, and love me.
Go now, and be at peace.

In this world, embraced by angels.
entry.summary:
Hey,
When you read these words, I am already gone.
Think not of who I was. Forget me now—
My friend, my family, my love, my all.
This world has been shattered in the darkness before the dawn,
And yet… we have not forgotten the warmth of the light.

I wonder, why is humanity so fragile?
You, you weep for the future.
He, he prays for an end to the pain.
I, I make a sacrifice in the name of hope.
And the world, it just blankets us all.

I try to remember… I reach out my hand, but find only velvet darkness before me.
It should be the memories, the bliss, waltzing to a forgotten melody, that fill our hearts,
Not this present pain, this memory that will not fade.
entry.title: Logs_2

entry.content:
PUBLIC INFORMATION BULLETIN
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Date: July 22, 2025
Case File: 7212025-HOMICIDE-BLK-01
Subject: Homicide Investigation at Abandoned School Facility

[TOKYO, JAPAN] – Law enforcement authorities have launched a homicide investigation following the discovery of a deceased individual in a derelict school building in a seismically active zone.

On the morning of July 21, 2025, authorities received a report concerning a suspected homicide. Officers were dispatched to the reported location: a school facility that had been abandoned for a significant period following severe damage from a past earthquake. Due to the high frequency of seismic activity in the region, the structure was never rebuilt.

An initial search of the premises was conducted over a period of two hours, yielding no immediate results. As the operational team prepared to withdraw, a single gunshot was heard originating from a concealed section of the school.

Officers traced the sound to a hidden entryway, which led to a subterranean electrical maintenance basement. The preliminary investigation revealed that the basement had been modified for specialized use, with established ventilation, internet connectivity, and a power supply.

Inside the chamber, officers discovered a deceased male, seated on the floor. The cause of death was determined to be a fatal shotgun wound to the head, which left the individual’s identity unrecognizable.

The following items of evidentiary value were recovered from the immediate vicinity of the deceased:

One (1) shotgun

One (1) unspent shotgun shell

One (1) spent shotgun shell casing

A laptop computer, rendered inoperable by extensive blood damage

A photograph of an unidentified female, the subject’s face obscured by bloodstains

The area has been officially cordoned off as an active crime scene. The preliminary motive is being investigated in connection with Internet Relay Chat (IRC) logs submitted by the reporting party.

The decedent’s body has been transported to the forensic services division for a full autopsy and toxicological screening. Investigators are actively exploring potential links between this case and the recent series of high-profile disappearance and murder cases in the region.

This is an ongoing investigation. Further details will be released as they become available.
entry.summary:
PUBLIC INFORMATION BULLETIN
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Date: July 22, 2025
Case File: 7212025-HOMICIDE-BLK-01
Subject: Homicide Investigation at Abandoned School Facility

[TOKYO, JAPAN] – Law enforcement authorities have launched a homicide investigation following the discovery of a deceased individual in a derelict school building in a seismically active zone.
entry.title: Logs_1
